issues.description: Action type 'PlayFromTrash' is not valid. The correct action for adding a card from trash to hand is 'ReturnToHand'. 'PlayFromTrash' would play the card directly onto the board, which contradicts the effect text 'add...to your hand'.
Filter missing 'type' constraint. Card must be a Character (type). Current filter only specifies color and cost, missing the type requirement.
